ores.description: Raw materials for smithing and crafting

copper_ore.description: A common copper ore used for bronze bars.

tin_ore.description: A common tin ore used for bronze bars.

iron_ore.description: An iron ore used for iron and steel bars.

coal.description: Essential fuel for smelting higher-tier bars.

mithril_ore.description: A rare blue ore used for mithril bars.

adamantite_ore.description: A valuable green ore used for adamantite bars.

runite_ore.description: The rarest ore, used for runite bars.

log.description: Basic logs from normal trees. Used for fletching.

oak_log.description: Sturdy oak logs. Used for fletching.

willow_log.description: Flexible willow logs. Used for fletching.

maple_log.description: Strong maple logs. Used for fletching.

yew_log.description: High-quality yew logs. Used for fletching.

magic_log.description: Rare magical logs. Used for fletching.

redwood_log.description: Ancient redwood logs. Used for fletching.

seeds.description: Seeds for growing crops on your farm

potato_seed.description:
Plant to grow potatoes. Grows in 2h.
Requires farming level 1.

onion_seed.description:
Plant to grow onions. Grows in 3h.
Requires farming level 5.

cabbage_seed.description:
Plant to grow cabbage. Grows in 4h.
Requires farming level 10.

carrot_seed.description:
Plant to grow carrots. Grows in 5h.
Requires farming level 15.

tomato_seed.description:
Plant to grow tomatoes. Grows in 6h.
Requires farming level 20.

corn_seed.description:
Plant to grow corn. Grows in 7h.
Requires farming level 25.

pumpkin_seed.description:
Plant to grow pumpkins. Grows in 9h.
Requires farming level 30.

watermelon_seed.description:

strawberry_seed.description:

magic_herb_seed.description:

dragon_fruit_seed.description:

golden_wheat_seed.description:

celestial_bloom_seed.description:

starfruit_seed.description:

void_lotus_seed.description:
